response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume does not demonstrate the 8 years of C++ experience required for this role. C++ exposure appears limited to a short stint at National Instruments (2007-2008) and a bachelor thesis project. There is also no evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform leadership, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical lead experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with full-stack and systems breadth
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput services at Sociomantic (DLang)
Founder of an open-source platform deployable on Kubernetes, showing ownership
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Strong engineering breadth and ownership mindset
